message:
fix(release): Use bun- prefix for cross-compilation targets

- Fixed target names to use bun-linux-x64, bun-darwin-arm64, etc.
- Simplified to single ubuntu runner with cross-compilation
- Removed retired macos-13 runner dependency

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,23 +16,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   build:
-    strategy:
-      matrix:
-        include:
-          - os: ubuntu-latest
-            target: linux-x64
-            artifact: cass-memory-linux-x64
-          - os: macos-latest
-            target: darwin-arm64
-            artifact: cass-memory-macos-arm64
-          - os: macos-13
-            target: darwin-x64
-            artifact: cass-memory-macos-x64
-          - os: windows-latest
-            target: windows-x64
-            artifact: cass-memory-windows-x64.exe
-
-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -45,45 +29,38 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install
 
-      - name: Build binary
-        shell: bash
+      - name: Build all binaries (cross-compilation)
         run: |
           mkdir -p dist
-          case "${{ matrix.target }}" in
-            linux-x64)
-              bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=linux-x64 --outfile dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}
-              ;;
-            darwin-arm64)
-              bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}
-              ;;
-            darwin-x64)
-              bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=darwin-x64 --outfile dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}
-              ;;
-            windows-x64)
-              bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=windows-x64 --outfile dist/cass-memory-windows-x64
-              ;;
-          esac
-
-      - name: Generate checksum (Unix)
-        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
-        run: |
-          cd dist
-          sha256sum ${{ matrix.artifact }} > ${{ matrix.artifact }}.sha256
 
-      - name: Generate checksum (Windows)
-        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
-        shell: pwsh
+          # Linux x64
+          bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cass-memory-linux-x64
+
+          # macOS ARM64 (Apple Silicon)
+          bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cass-memory-macos-arm64
+
+          # macOS x64 (Intel)
+          bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cass-memory-macos-x64
+
+          # Windows x64
+          bun build src/cm.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/cass-memory-windows-x64.exe
+
+          ls -la dist/
+
+      - name: Generate checksums
         run: |
           cd dist
-          $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 "cass-memory-windows-x64.exe").Hash.ToLower()
-          "$hash  cass-memory-windows-x64.exe" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "cass-memory-windows-x64.exe.sha256"
+          sha256sum cass-memory-linux-x64 > cass-memory-linux-x64.sha256
+          sha256sum cass-memory-macos-arm64 > cass-memory-macos-arm64.sha256
+          sha256sum cass-memory-macos-x64 > cass-memory-macos-x64.sha256
+          sha256sum cass-memory-windows-x64.exe > cass-memory-windows-x64.exe.sha256
+          ls -la
 
-      - name: Upload artifact
+      - name: Upload artifacts
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: ${{ matrix.artifact }}
-          path: |
-            dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}*
+          name: binaries
+          path: dist/*
           if-no-files-found: error
 
   release:
@@ -93,16 +70,14 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Download all artifacts
+      - name: Download artifacts
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
-          path: artifacts
+          name: binaries
+          path: release
 
-      - name: Prepare release assets
-        run: |
-          mkdir -p release
-          find artifacts -type f \( -name "cass-memory-*" -o -name "*.sha256" \) -exec cp {} release/ \;
-          ls -la release/
+      - name: List release assets
+        run: ls -la release/
 
       - name: Get version
         id: version
@@ -126,7 +101,6 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
-  # Also build and publish install script checksum
   publish-installer:
     needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -135,8 +109,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Generate installer checksum
-        run: |
-          sha256sum install.sh > install.sh.sha256
+        run: sha256sum install.sh > install.sh.sha256
 
       - name: Get version
         id: version
